description: Privacy-first, unofficial Withings MCP server for AI health, sleep, activity and heart-rate agents.
name: io.github.davidmosiah/withingsmcp

environmentVariables.description: Withings OAuth client ID. Optional when configured with withings-mcp-server setup.
environmentVariables.name: WITHINGS_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Withings OAuth client secret. Prefer withings-mcp-server setup so this secret is stored in ~/.withings-mcp/config.json instead of MCP client config.
environmentVariables.name: WITHINGS_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Redirect URI configured in the Withings Developer Dashboard. Optional when configured with withings-mcp-server setup.
environmentVariables.name: WITHINGS_REDIRECT_URI

environmentVariables.description: Optional local path for OAuth tokens. Defaults to ~/.withings-mcp/tokens.json.
environmentVariables.name: WITHINGS_TOKEN_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional payload mode: summary, structured, or raw. Defaults to structured. raw means full Withings API payloads, not continuous 24/7 raw sensor telemetry.
environmentVariables.name: WITHINGS_PRIVACY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Optional SQLite cache toggle. Set to true or sqlite to enable.
environmentVariables.name: WITHINGS_CACHE

environmentVariables.description: Optional local SQLite cache path. Defaults to ~/.withings-mcp/cache.sqlite.
environmentVariables.name: WITHINGS_CACHE_PATH
